summary: Frontend testing for contraction timer UI changes and Doula navigation. CRITICAL ISSUES FOUND: (1) Icon mappings missing for stopwatch-outline, flag-outline, and water icons - all render as circles. (2) Pattern status appears ABOVE action buttons instead of below as specified.

critical.issue: Missing icon mappings for stopwatch-outline, flag-outline, and water - all default to Circle icon
Pattern status badge appears ABOVE action buttons (History, Add Manual, Share, End) instead of BELOW as specified
critical.details: Screenshot shows Early Labor badge at Y=943, History button bottom at Y=1057. Pattern status should render after bottomActions and secondaryActionsRow but appears between main button and actions.

ui_bugs.issue: Renders as generic circle instead of stopwatch icon
Renders as generic circle instead of flag icon
Renders as generic circle instead of water droplet icon
ui_bugs.selector: Water Broke button in contraction timer

test_results.contraction_timer_tab_icon: FAIL - Shows circle instead of stopwatch-outline
test_results.contraction_timer_rest_timer: PASS - Rest timer counts up from 0 after contraction ends
test_results.contraction_timer_end_button_icon: FAIL - Shows circle instead of flag-outline
test_results.contraction_timer_water_broke_icon: FAIL - Shows circle instead of water icon
test_results.contraction_timer_pattern_status_positio: FAIL - Pattern status above actions, should be below
test_results.doula_birth_plan_navigation: PARTIAL - Goes to client-detail with tab=birthplan (fallback path when linked_mom_id is null)
test_results.doula_message_navigation: UNABLE TO VERIFY - Session issues during test
test_results.notes_breadcrumb_navigation: CODE OK - Correctly routes to client-detail page

action_items: Add missing icon mappings to /app/frontend/src/components/Icon.tsx: stopwatch-outline->Timer, timer-outline->Timer, flag-outline->Flag, flag->Flag, water->Droplet, water-outline->Droplet
Fix pattern status position in contraction-timer.tsx - should appear AFTER bottomActions and secondaryActionsRow sections, not before
Verify demo client data has linked_mom_id populated for Birth Plan direct navigation to work
critical_code_review_comments: Icon.tsx line 319: Falls back to Circle for any unmapped icon - stopwatch-outline, flag-outline, water all unmapped
contraction-timer.tsx layout order (lines 806-868): Code shows bottomActions -> secondaryActionsRow -> patternStatusCompact but UI renders pattern status above actions
ProviderClients.tsx line 414: Birth Plan navigation depends on client.linked_mom_id being non-null

success_rate.frontend: 40% - Critical icon and layout issues found

context_for_next_testing_agent: Icon mappings need to be added to Icon.tsx. Pattern status position in contraction-timer.tsx needs CSS/layout fix. Rest timer counting up is working correctly. Doula navigation code looks correct but depends on linked_mom_id data.
verification_screenshots: .screenshots/timer_full_layout.png - Shows pattern status above action buttons
.screenshots/doula_clients_fresh.png - Shows Birth Plan and Message buttons on client cards
